description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock at the rear for adjustable length and improved portability. The rifle has a prominent pistol grip and a detachable box magazine located just in front of the trigger guard. The handguard is cylindrical and ribbed, providing a secure grip and likely housing a gas system. The barrel is of standard length and capped with a flash hider at the muzzle, which helps reduce visible muzzle flash. Iron sights are mounted on the top rail, with the front and rear sights both visible. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability and reliability are essential.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, ribbed handguard, detachable box magazine, and iron sights. The design is robust and optimized for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with flash hider and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable box magazine, ribbed handguard, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the upper receiver and sights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the same key features from the other side.
